svg.title: Doubow background job index pipeline
svg.desc: Three provider adapters feed into a canonical job schema, then a fingerprint dedup check, then enrichment and embedding, finally stored in Postgres with pgvector.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should the SerpApi adapter work for Doubow job ingestion?')
sendPrompt('How should the Adzuna adapter work for Doubow job ingestion?')
sendPrompt('How should the RemoteOK adapter work for Doubow job ingestion?')
sendPrompt('What fields should the canonical job schema include for Doubow?')
g.text: title · company · location · apply_url · external_id · source

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should Doubow deduplicate jobs across SerpApi and Adzuna?')
g.text: hash(title + company + location) · drop if seen in 48h

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should Doubow tag jobs for visa sponsorship?')
sendPrompt('How should Doubow generate embeddings for job descriptions?')
sendPrompt('How should Doubow normalize salary data from job postings?')
sendPrompt('How should Doubow structure the jobs table in Postgres?')
sendPrompt('How does pgvector store job embeddings for ANN search in Doubow?')
sendPrompt('How does the Doubow match engine query the job index?')
